chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C.P. No.D-834 of 2025. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection ‘A’. 2. For hearing of main case. 04.09.2025. Petitioner is present in person. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Addl. A. G a/w SIP Gada Hussain of CIA Larkana & SIP Shahmeer of PS Baqapur. -.-.-.-.-.- Statements are filed on behalf of respondents No.2, 3 & 4, taken on record. In the statements the respondents have annexed copy of FIR No.22/2025 registered at PS Hatri Ghulam Shah, District Larkana, in which it is mentioned that the alleged detenue has been shown arrested. Copy of said FIR has been supplied to the petitioner in Court who upon receipt of the same seeks disposal of the petition. Since the purpose of petition has become infructuous, therefore, it is accordingly disposed of. Judge Judge M Yousuf Panhwar/**
